<!-- 05 カウンター素材 -->
<div class="section collapsed">
  <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
    <div class="section-header-left">
      <div class="section-toggle-icon">＋</div>
      <span class="section-title">カウンター素材</span>
      <span class="section-count">(4)</span>
    </div>
    <span class="section-selected-summary" id="summary-counter">人工大理石</span>
  </div>
  <div class="section-body">
    <div class="options-grid">

      <div class="option-card selected" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'counter','人工大理石','標準仕様')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus" style="background:#f0ece4">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 100 75"><rect width="100" height="75" fill="#f0ece4"/><path d="M10 20 Q30 15 50 25 Q70 35 90 20" stroke="#d0c8bc" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/><path d="M5 40 Q25 35 45 42 Q65 50 95 38" stroke="#c8c0b4" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/><path d="M0 60 Q20 55 40 62 Q70 70 100 58" stroke="#d0c8bc" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/></svg>
          <button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button>
        </div>
        <div class="option-body">
          <div class="option-label">人工大理石</div>
          <div class="option-sub">汚れに強く清潔</div>
          <div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">オープン価格</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item standard"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val standard">標準仕様</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="url-row">
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button>
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button>
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button>
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="option-card" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'counter','ステンレス','標準仕様')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus" style="background:#c8ccd0">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 100 75"><rect width="100" height="75" fill="#c8ccd0"/><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="100" y2="75" stroke="#d8dcdf" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="100" y2="93" stroke="#d8dcdf" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="0" y1="36" x2="100" y2="111" stroke="#d8dcdf" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/></svg>
          <button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button>
        </div>
        <div class="option-body">
          <div class="option-label">ステンレス</div>
          <div class="option-sub">耐久性・プロ仕様</div>
          <div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">オープン価格</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item standard"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val standard">標準仕様</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="url-row">
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button>
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button>
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button>
          <button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="option-card" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'counter','セラミック','＋88,000円')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus" style="background:#d8d0c8">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 100 75"><rect width="100" height="75" fill="#d8d0c8"/><rect x="2" y="2" width="46" height="35" fill="#e0d8d0" stroke="#c8c0b8" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="52" y="2" width="46" height="35" fill="#c8c0b8" stroke="#c8c0b8" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="2" y="40" width="46" height="33" fill="#c8c0b8" stroke="#c8c0b8" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="52" y="40" width="46" height="33" fill="#e0d8d0" stroke="#c8c0b8" stroke-width="1"/></svg>
          <button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button>
        </div>
        <div class="option-body">
          <div class="option-label">セラミック</div>
          <div class="option-sub">耐熱・高級感</div>
          <div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">¥ 105,600</span></div>

        <div class="url-row"><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button></div>
      </div>

      <div class="option-card" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'storage','吊り戸棚なし','－11,000円')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus">🪟<button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button></div>
        <div class="option-body"><div class="option-label">吊り戸棚なし</div><div class="option-sub">開放感重視</div><div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">¥ -13,200</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item free"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val">¥ -11,000</span></div>
          </div></div>
        <div class="url-row"><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button></div>
      </div>

      <div class="option-card" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'storage','背面収納一体型','＋198,000円')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus">📦<button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button></div>
        <div class="option-body"><div class="option-label">背面収納一体型</div><div class="option-sub">カップボード付き</div><div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">¥ 237,600</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item sale"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val">¥ 198,000</span></div>
          </div></div>
        <div class="url-row"><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button></div>
      </div>

      <div class="option-card" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'storage','昇降式収納','＋66,000円')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus">⬆️<button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button></div>
        <div class="option-body"><div class="option-label">昇降式吊り戸棚</div><div class="option-sub">電動・取り出し楽々</div><div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">¥ 79,200</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item sale"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val">¥ 66,000</span></div>
          </div></div>
        <div class="url-row"><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- 10 食器洗い乾燥機 -->
<div class="section collapsed">
  <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection(this)">
    <div class="section-header-left">
      <div class="section-toggle-icon">＋</div>
      <span class="section-title">食器洗い乾燥機</span>
      <span class="section-count">(3)</span>
    </div>
    <span class="section-selected-summary" id="summary-dishwasher">なし</span>
  </div>
  <div class="section-body">
    <div class="options-grid">

      <div class="option-card selected" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'dishwasher','なし','標準仕様')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus">🚫<button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button></div>
        <div class="option-body"><div class="option-label">食洗機なし</div><div class="option-sub">収納として活用</div><div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">オープン価格</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item standard"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val standard">標準仕様</span></div>
          </div></div>
        <div class="url-row"><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button></div>
      </div>

      <div class="option-card" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'dishwasher','スリム食洗機','＋77,000円')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus">🍽️<button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button></div>
        <div class="option-body"><div class="option-label">スリム食洗機</div><div class="option-sub">45cm幅 / 省スペース</div><div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">¥ 92,400</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item sale"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val">¥ 77,000</span></div>
          </div></div>
        <div class="url-row"><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button></div>
      </div>

      <div class="option-card" onclick="selectCard(event,this,'dishwasher','ワイド食洗機','＋110,000円')">
        <div class="check-badge"><svg viewBox="0 0 9 9" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><polyline points="1.5,4.5 3.5,6.5 7.5,2"/></svg></div>
        <div class="option-illus">🍳<button class="zoom-btn" onclick="openZoom(event,this)" title="拡大"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="4.5"/><line x1="10" y1="10" x2="14" y2="14"/><line x1="4.5" y1="6.5" x2="8.5" y2="6.5"/><line x1="6.5" y1="4.5" x2="6.5" y2="8.5"/></svg></button></div>
        <div class="option-body"><div class="option-label">ワイド食洗機</div><div class="option-sub">60cm幅 / 大容量</div><div class="price-list">
            <div class="price-row-item"><span>定価:</span><span class="price-val standard">¥ 132,000</span></div>
            <div class="price-row-item sale"><span>売価:</span><span class="price-val">¥ 110,000</span></div>
          </div></div>
        <div class="url-row"><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL①')">URL①</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL②')">URL②</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL③')">URL③</button><button class="url-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();showToast('URL④')">URL④</button></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>


    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="p4-footer">
    <button class="p4-back" id="p4BackBtn">戻る</button>
    <div class="p4-footer-prices">
      本体価格（税込）：<span class="val" id="basePrice">¥980,000</span><br>
      変更差額（税込）：<span class="val" id="diffPrice">¥＋150,000</span>
    </div>
    <div class="p4-fdiv"></div>
    <div class="p4-footer-total">
      <div class="p4-footer-total-label">合計（税込）</div>
      <div class="p4-footer-total-val" id="totalPrice">1,243,000 円</div>
    </div>
    <button class="p4-confirm">進む</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ZOOM MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="zoomModal" onclick="closeZoom(event)">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span id="zoomTitle">詳細</span>
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('zoomModal').classList.remove('open')">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-illus" id="zoomIllus"></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="modal-label" id="zoomLabel"></div>
      <div class="modal-sub" id="zoomSub"></div>
      <div class="modal-price" id="zoomPrice"></div>
      <div class="modal-urls">
        <button class="modal-url-btn" onclick="showToast('URL①')">URL①</button>
        <button class="modal-url-btn" onclick="showToast('URL②')">URL②</button>
        <button class="modal-url-btn" onclick="showToast('URL③')">URL③</button>
        <button class="modal-url-btn" onclick="showToast('URL④')">URL④</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
const BASE = 980000, TAX = 0.10;
const prices = { plan:150000, height:0, sink:0, color:0, counter:0, stove:0, faucet:0, hood:0, storage:0, dishwasher:0 };

function parse(s) {
  if (!s || s.includes('標準仕様')) return 0;
  const n = s.replace(/[＋+]/g,'+').replace(/[－\-]/g,'-').replace(/[,，円\s]/g,'')
             .replace(/[０-９]/g, c => String.fromCharCode(c.charCodeAt(0)-0xFF10+48));
  const v = parseInt(n,10); return isNaN(v) ? 0 : v;
}
function fmt(n) { return n.toLocaleString('ja-JP'); }

function updateFooter() {
  const diff = Object.values(prices).reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0);
  const total = Math.floor((BASE+diff)*(1+TAX));
  document.getElementById('basePrice').textContent = '¥'+fmt(BASE);
  const ds = document.getElementById('diffPrice');
  ds.textContent = (diff>=0?'¥＋':'¥－')+fmt(Math.abs(diff));
  ds.style.color = diff>0?'#c62828':diff<0?'#1565c0':'#666';
  const tv = document.getElementById('totalPrice');
  tv.textContent = '¥'+fmt(total);
  tv.classList.remove('bump'); void tv.offsetWidth; tv.classList.add('bump');
  setTimeout(()=>tv.classList.remove('bump'),300);
}


function openSection(index) {
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.sections-wrap .section');
  const target = sections[index];
  if (!target) return;

  const isCollapsed = target.classList.contains('collapsed');

  if (isCollapsed) {
    // open
    target.classList.remove('collapsed');
    target.querySelector('.section-toggle-icon').textContent = '－';
    const b = target.querySelector('.section-body');
    b.classList.add('animating');
    setTimeout(() => b.classList.remove('animating'), 400);
    // scroll to section smoothly
    setTimeout(() => {
      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }, 60);
  } else {
    // collapse
    target.classList.add('collapsed');
    target.querySelector('.section-toggle-icon').textContent = '＋';
  }
}

function toggleSection(h) {
  const s = h.closest('.section'), was = s.classList.contains('collapsed');
  s.classList.toggle('collapsed');
  h.querySelector('.section-toggle-icon').textContent = s.classList.contains('collapsed') ? '＋' : '－';
  if (was) {
    const b = s.querySelector('.section-body');
    b.classList.add('animating');
    setTimeout(()=>b.classList.remove('animating'),400);
  }
}

function selectCard(e, card, key, label, ps) {
  card.closest('.section-body').querySelectorAll('.option-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('selected'));
  card.classList.add('selected');
  const el = document.getElementById('summary-'+key); if(el) el.textContent = label;
  prices[key] = parse(ps); updateFooter();
}
function selectHeight(e, card, label) {
  card.closest('.section-body').querySelectorAll('.height-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('selected'));
  card.classList.add('selected');
  document.getElementById('summary-height').textContent = label;
  prices.height = 0; updateFooter();
}
function selectSink(e, card, label) {
  card.closest('.section-body').querySelectorAll('.sink-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('selected'));
  card.classList.add('selected');
  document.getElementById('summary-sink').textContent = label;
  prices.sink = 0; updateFooter();
}
function selectColor(e, card, label) {
  card.closest('.section-body').querySelectorAll('.color-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('selected'));
  card.classList.add('selected');
  document.getElementById('summary-color').textContent = label;
  prices.color = 0; updateFooter();
}

function openZoom(e, btn) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  // すべてのカード種別に対応
  const card = btn.closest('.option-card')
             || btn.closest('.height-card')
             || btn.closest('.sink-card')
             || btn.closest('.color-card');
  if (!card) return;

  // イラストエリア: option-illus / height-illus / sink-figure-wrap / color-swatch-wrap
  const illusEl = btn.closest('.option-illus')
               || btn.closest('.height-illus')
               || btn.closest('.sink-figure-wrap')
               || btn.closest('.color-swatch-wrap');

  const label = card.querySelector('.option-label');
  const sub   = card.querySelector('.option-sub');
  // 価格は price-list から定価・売価を両方取得
  const priceItems = card.querySelectorAll('.price-row-item .price-val');
  let priceText = '';
  priceItems.forEach(p => { priceText += p.innerText + '  '; });

  // illus をクローンして zoom-btn を除去
  const clone = illusEl ? illusEl.cloneNode(true) : document.createElement('div');
  clone.querySelectorAll('.zoom-btn').forEach(b => b.remove());

  document.getElementById('zoomIllus').innerHTML = clone.innerHTML;
  document.getElementById('zoomTitle').textContent = label ? label.innerText : '詳細';
  document.getElementById('zoomLabel').textContent = label ? label.innerText : '';
  document.getElementById('zoomSub').textContent   = sub   ? sub.innerText   : '';
  document.getElementById('zoomPrice').textContent = priceText.trim();
  document.getElementById('zoomModal').classList.add('open');
}
function closeZoom(e) {
  if (e.target === document.getElementById('zoomModal'))
    document.getElementById('zoomModal').classList.remove('open');
}

function showToast(msg) {
  const t = document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent = msg+' を開きます';
  t.classList.remove('show'); void t.offsetWidth;
  t.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2000);
}

updateFooter();
</script>


<script>
function goPage(from, to) {
  document.getElementById('page'+from).classList.remove('active');
  document.getElementById('page'+to).classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}
function goToP4(planIdx) {
  goPage(1, 2);
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('#page2 .option-card');
  const idx = planIdx === 1 ? 1 : 0;
  if (cards[idx]) setTimeout(() => cards[idx].click(), 60);
}
function selectMaker(tab) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.p3-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  tab.classList.add('active');
}
let p3Selected = -1;
function selectPlan(idx) {
  [0,1,2].forEach(i => document.getElementById('p3c'+i).classList.toggle('selected', i===idx));
  p3Selected = idx;
  const btn = document.getElementById('p3NextBtn');
  btn.className = 'p3-footer-btn green';
  btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';
  btn.onclick = () => goToP4(idx);
}
document.getElementById('p3BackBtn').onclick = () => goPage(1, 0);
document.getElementById('p4BackBtn').onclick  = () => goPage(2, 1);


// ── P5: 工事費ページのロジック ──────────────────
const P5_PRICES = {'kitchen': 200000, 'gaihen': 44000, 'kenchiku': 33000, 'makita': 44000, 'anker': 22000, 'haiki': 33000, 'panel': 44000, 'rangehood': 33000, 'ih_elec': 33000, 'tsuridana': 33000, 'wall': 33000, 'elev': 33000, 'dishwasher_elec': 33000};

const p5Checked = {};
// 初期状態
p5Checked['kitchen'] = true;
p5Checked['gaihen'] = false;
p5Checked['kenchiku'] = false;
p5Checked['makita'] = false;
p5Checked['anker'] = false;
p5Checked['haiki'] = false;
p5Checked['panel'] = false;
p5Checked['rangehood'] = false;
p5Checked['ih_elec'] = false;
p5Checked['tsuridana'] = false;
p5Checked['wall'] = false;
p5Checked['elev'] = false;
p5Checked['dishwasher_elec'] = false;

function p5Toggle(key) {
  p5Checked[key] = !p5Checked[key];
  const chk = document.getElementById('p5check-' + key);
  const prx = document.getElementById('p5price-' + key);
  if (p5Checked[key]) {
    chk.className = 'p5-check on'; chk.textContent = '✓';
    prx.className = 'p5-price-box active';
  } else {
    chk.className = 'p5-check off'; chk.textContent = '';
    prx.className = 'p5-price-box inactive';
  }
  p5UpdateTotal();
}

function p5SetCheck(key, val) {
  if (p5Checked[key] === val) return;
  p5Checked[key] = val;
  const chk = document.getElementById('p5check-' + key);
  const prx = document.getElementById('p5price-' + key);
  if (!chk) return;
  if (val) {
    chk.className = 'p5-check on'; chk.textContent = '✓';
    prx.className = 'p5-price-box active';
  } else {
    chk.className = 'p5-check off'; chk.textContent = '';
    prx.className = 'p5-price-box inactive';
  }
}

function p5UpdateTotal() {
  let total = 0;
  for (const [key, price] of Object.entries(P5_PRICES)) {
    if (p5Checked[key]) total += price;
  }
  // 税込
  const taxed = Math.floor(total * 1.1);
  document.getElementById('p5Total').textContent = '¥ ' + taxed.toLocaleString('ja-JP');
}

// P4の選択状態からP5の自動チェックを設定
function p5SyncFromP4() {
  // コンロ: IH3口 → IH調理機器の電気工事
  const stoveSummary = document.getElementById('summary-stove');
  const isIH = stoveSummary && stoveSummary.textContent.includes('IH');
  p5SetCheck('ih_elec', isIH);

  // 食洗機: スリム食洗機 (なし以外) → 食洗器用電源工事
  const dishSummary = document.getElementById('summary-dishwasher');
  const hasDish = dishSummary && dishSummary.textContent.trim() !== 'なし' && dishSummary.textContent.trim() !== '';
  p5SetCheck('dishwasher_elec', hasDish);

  // 吊り戸棚: 吊り戸棚あり → 吊戸棚施工費
  const storageSummary = document.getElementById('summary-storage');
  const hasStorage = storageSummary && storageSummary.textContent.includes('あり');
  p5SetCheck('tsuridana', hasStorage);

  p5UpdateTotal();
}

// P4「進む」ボタン → P5へ
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const confirmBtn = document.querySelector('#page2 .p4-confirm');
  if (confirmBtn) {
    confirmBtn.onclick = () => {
      p5SyncFromP4();
      goPage(2, 5);
    };
  }
  p5UpdateTotal();
});



// ── P6: 見積画面のロジック ──────────────────────

// P4セクション定義（カテゴリkey → 表示名）
// P5の「OK」ボタン → P6へ遷移
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const p5Ok = document.querySelector('#page5 .p5-ok');
  if (p5Ok) {
    p5Ok.onclick = () => {
      p6BuildItems();
      goPage(5, 6);
    };
  }
});



// ── PAGE 7: 顧客登録 ─────────────────────
function p7Toggle(btn) {
  btn.closest('.p7-toggle-wrap').querySelectorAll('.p7-toggle-btn').forEach(b => {
    b.className = 'p7-toggle-btn inactive';
  });
  btn.className = 'p7-toggle-btn active';
}

function p7Submit() {
  const lastName = document.getElementById('p7LastName').value.trim();
  const errEl = document.getElementById('p7LastNameErr');
  if (!lastName) {
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('p7LastName').focus();
    return;
  }
  errEl.style.display = 'none';
  // 登録成功フラグON
  p7Registered = true;
  // P6のお客様情報パネルに名前を反映
  const custPanel = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-panel-body');
  if (custPanel) {
    custPanel.innerHTML = `名前: ${lastName}<br>電話番号:<br>Eメール:`;
  }
  goPage(7, 6);
}

// P6の「編集」ボタン（お客様情報）と「見積」ボタン → P7へ
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  // お客様情報パネルの編集ボタン
  const custEdit = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-panel-edit');
  if (custEdit) custEdit.onclick = () => goPage(6, 7);

  // 見積ボタン: 登録済みならモーダル、未登録ならP7へ
  const mitsumoriBtn = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-act-btn.blue');
  if (mitsumoriBtn) mitsumoriBtn.onclick = () => {
    if (p7Registered) {
      openMitsumoriModal();
    } else {
      goPage(6, 7);
    }
  };
});



// ── 見積アクションモーダル ─────────────────────
// P7登録済みフラグ
let p7Registered = false;

function openMitsumoriModal() {
  document.getElementById('mitsumoriModal').classList.add('open');
}
function closeMitsumoriModal() {
  document.getElementById('mitsumoriModal').classList.remove('open');
}
function mitsumoriPrint() {
  closeMitsumoriModal();
  alert('印刷処理を実行します');
}
function mitsumoriEmail() {
  closeMitsumoriModal();
  alert('Eメール送信画面を開きます');
}



// ── PAGE 8: 見積履歴 ────────────────────────
// 見積データストア（セッション中に蓄積）
const p8Estimates = [];

function p8AddEstimate(data) {
  p8Estimates.unshift(data); // 新しいものを先頭に
  p8RefreshTable();
}

function p8RefreshTable() {
  const tbody = document.getElementById('p8TableBody');
  if (!tbody) return;

  // サマリー更新
  const totalTax = p8Estimates.reduce((s, e) => s + (e.totalTaxIn || 0), 0);
  const fmt = n => '¥ ' + n.toLocaleString('ja-JP');
  const countEl = document.getElementById('p8Count');
  const totalEl = document.getElementById('p8TotalAmount');
  const costEl  = document.getElementById('p8CostAmount');
  if (countEl) countEl.textContent = p8Estimates.length;
  if (totalEl) totalEl.textContent = fmt(totalTax);
  if (costEl)  costEl.textContent  = fmt(totalTax);

  // テーブル行生成
  tbody.innerHTML = p8Estimates.map((e, i) => {
    const no = '0101T' + String(p8Estimates.length - i).padStart(3, '0');
    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    return `<tr>
      <td><select class="p8-rank-select"><option>見積応出済</option><option>受注</option><option>失注</option></select></td>
      <td>テスト Cainz</td>
      <td>${no}</td>
      <td><span class="p8-customer-link" onclick="p9Open(p8Estimates[${i}], '0101T'+String(p8Estimates.length - ${i}).padStart(3,'0'))">${e.customerName || '—'}</span></td>
      <td>${e.kojiName || 'キッチン工事'}</td>
      <td>${today}</td>
      <td>${fmt(e.totalTaxIn || 0)}</td>
      <td>${fmt(e.totalTaxIn || 0)}</td>
      <td>¥0</td>
      <td>0.00%</td>
      <td>${e.address || ''}</td>
      <td></td>
      <td></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');
}

// 見積モーダルの「完了」ボタン → P8へ遷移し見積を登録
function mitsumoriDone() {
  // P6から合計金額を取得
  const totalEl = document.getElementById('p6SumIn');
  const totalStr = totalEl ? totalEl.textContent.replace(/[¥,\s]/g, '') : '0';
  const totalNum = parseInt(totalStr, 10) || 0;

  // 顧客名をP6パネルから取得
  const custPanel = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-panel-body');
  let customerName = '—';
  if (custPanel) {
    const match = custPanel.innerHTML.match(/名前:\s*([^<\n]+)/);
    if (match) customerName = match[1].trim();
  }

  p8AddEstimate({
    customerName,
    kojiName: 'キッチン工事',
    totalTaxIn: totalNum,
    address: '',
  });

  closeMitsumoriModal();
  goPage(6, 8);
}



// ── PAGE 9: 見積詳細 ─────────────────────────

// 折り畳みトグル
function p9Toggle(bodyId, arrowId) {
  const body  = document.getElementById(bodyId);
  const arrow = document.getElementById(arrowId);
  if (!body || !arrow) return;
  const isOpen = body.classList.contains('open');
  body.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
  arrow.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
}

// P8の顧客名クリック → P9を開いてデータをセット
function p9Open(estimate, estNo) {
  const fmt = n => n.toLocaleString('ja-JP') + ' 円';
  const taxEx = Math.round((estimate.totalTaxIn || 0) / 1.1);
  const today  = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);

  // パンくず
  const bc = document.getElementById('p9Breadcrumb');
  if (bc) bc.textContent = estNo;
  const mainTab = document.getElementById('p9MainTab');
  if (mainTab) mainTab.textContent = estNo;

  // 顧客情報
  const setTxt = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.textContent = val || '—'; };
  setTxt('p9Name',      estimate.customerName);
  setTxt('p9Address',   estimate.address);
  setTxt('p9EstNo',     estNo);
  setTxt('p9EstDate',   today);
  setTxt('p9KojiName',  estimate.kojiName || 'キッチン工事');
  setTxt('p9KojiName2', estimate.kojiName || 'キッチン工事');
  setTxt('p9EstNo2',    estNo);

  // 金額
  setTxt('p9TotalTaxIn',  fmt(estimate.totalTaxIn || 0));
  setTxt('p9TotalTaxEx',  fmt(taxEx));
  setTxt('p9CostEx',      fmt(taxEx));
  setTxt('p9CostIn',      fmt(estimate.totalTaxIn || 0));
  setTxt('p9RealCostEx',  fmt(taxEx));
  setTxt('p9RealCostIn',  fmt(estimate.totalTaxIn || 0));

  // セクションを開いた状態にリセット
  ['custSection','estSection'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.add('open');
  });
  ['custArrow','estArrow'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.add('open');
  });

  // P6特記事項をP9に反映
  const tokkiEl = document.getElementById('p6Tokki');
  const remarksEl = document.getElementById('p9Remarks');
  if (tokkiEl && remarksEl) {
    remarksEl.textContent = tokkiEl.value.trim() || '—';
  }

  goPage(8, 9);
}



// ── エクスポート処理 ──────────────────────────
function p9ExportExcel(type) {
  // 現在の見積データを取得
  const estNo   = document.getElementById('p9EstNo')  ? document.getElementById('p9EstNo').textContent  : '—';
  const name    = document.getElementById('p9Name')   ? document.getElementById('p9Name').textContent   : '—';
  const koji    = document.getElementById('p9KojiName')? document.getElementById('p9KojiName').textContent: '—';
  const taxIn   = document.getElementById('p9TotalTaxIn')? document.getElementById('p9TotalTaxIn').textContent: '—';
  const taxEx   = document.getElementById('p9TotalTaxEx')? document.getElementById('p9TotalTaxEx').textContent: '—';
  const today   = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  const now     = new Date().toLocaleString('ja-JP');

  const typeNames = { mitsumori: '見積明細', gaiyou: '見積概要', info: '見積情報' };
  const typeName  = typeNames[type] || type;

  // CSVデータ生成
  let csv = '';
  if (type === 'mitsumori') {
    csv = [
      ['見積明細書'],
      ['見積No.', estNo],
      ['顧客名', name],
      ['工事名', koji],
      ['見積日', today],
      [''],
      ['品目', '数量', '単位', '金額（税抜）'],
    ];
    // P6の明細を収集
    const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#p6ItemsWrap .p6-item-row');
    rows.forEach(row => {
      const n = row.querySelector('.p6-item-name')?.textContent?.trim() || '';
      const q = row.querySelector('.p6-item-qty')?.textContent?.trim()  || '';
      const p = row.querySelector('.p6-item-price')?.textContent?.trim()|| '';
      csv.push([n, q, '', p]);
    });
    csv.push(['']);
    csv.push(['合計（税抜）', '', '', taxEx]);
    csv.push(['合計（税込）', '', '', taxIn]);
  } else if (type === 'gaiyou') {
    csv = [
      ['見積概要'],
      ['見積No.',  estNo],
      ['顧客名',   name],
      ['工事名',   koji],
      ['見積日',   today],
      ['合計（税抜）', taxEx],
      ['合計（税込）', taxIn],
    ];
  } else {
    csv = [
      ['見積情報'],
      ['見積No.',  estNo],
      ['顧客名',   name],
      ['工事名',   koji],
      ['見積日',   today],
      ['担当者',   'テスト Cainz'],
      ['合計（税抜）', taxEx],
      ['合計（税込）', taxIn],
    ];
  }

  // CSV文字列化
  const csvStr = csv.map(row => row.map(c => `"${String(c).replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(',')).join('\n');
  const bom = '\uFEFF';
  const blob = new Blob([bom + csvStr], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8' });
  const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a    = document.createElement('a');
  a.href     = url;
  a.download = `${typeName}_${estNo}_${today}.csv`;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);

  // 電子取引履歴に記録
  const tbody = document.getElementById('p9DensiBody');
  if (tbody) {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML = `
      <td>${now}</td>
      <td>cainztest</td>
      <td>${name.split(' ')[0] || name}</td>
      <td>${name.split(' ')[1] || ''}</td>
      <td>${typeName}</td>
      <td>${estNo}</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>CSVエクスポート</td>
    `;
    tbody.appendChild(tr);
  }
}



// ── エクスポート処理 ──────────────────────────
function p9ExportExcel(type) {
  const getText = id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); return el ? el.textContent.trim() : '—'; };
  const estNo  = getText('p9EstNo');
  const name   = getText('p9Name');
  const koji   = getText('p9KojiName');
  const taxIn  = getText('p9TotalTaxIn');
  const taxEx  = getText('p9TotalTaxEx');
  const today  = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  const now    = new Date().toLocaleString('ja-JP');
  const typeNames = { mitsumori: '見積明細', gaiyou: '見積概要', info: '見積情報' };
  const typeName  = typeNames[type] || type;

  let rows = [];
  if (type === 'mitsumori') {
    rows = [['見積明細書'],['見積No.',estNo],['顧客名',name],['工事名',koji],['見積日',today],[''],['品目','数量','単位','金額']];
    document.querySelectorAll('#p6ItemsWrap .p6-item-row').forEach(row => {
      rows.push([
        row.querySelector('.p6-item-name')?.textContent?.trim()||'',
        row.querySelector('.p6-item-qty')?.textContent?.trim()||'',
        '式',
        row.querySelector('.p6-item-price')?.textContent?.trim()||''
      ]);
    });
    rows.push([''],['合計（税抜）','','',taxEx],['合計（税込）','','',taxIn]);
  } else if (type === 'gaiyou') {
    rows = [['見積概要'],['見積No.',estNo],['顧客名',name],['工事名',koji],['見積日',today],['合計（税抜）',taxEx],['合計（税込）',taxIn]];
  } else {
    rows = [['見積情報'],['見積No.',estNo],['顧客名',name],['工事名',koji],['見積日',today],['担当者','テスト Cainz'],['合計（税抜）',taxEx],['合計（税込）',taxIn]];
  }

  const csv  = rows.map(r => r.map(c => '"'+String(c).replace(/"/g,'""')+'"').join(',')).join('\n');
  const blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF'+csv], {type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8'});
  const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a    = Object.assign(document.createElement('a'), {href:url, download:`${typeName}_${estNo}_${today}.csv`});
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);

  // 電子取引履歴に記録
  const tbody = document.getElementById('p9DensiBody');
  if (tbody) {
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    const parts = name.split(/\s+/);
    tr.innerHTML = `<td>${now}</td><td>cainztest</td><td>${parts[0]||''}</td><td>${parts[1]||''}</td><td>${typeName}</td><td>${estNo}</td><td></td><td>CSVエクスポート</td>`;
    tbody.prepend(tr);
  }
}



// ── 見積共有モーダル ─────────────────────────
function p9ShareOpen() {
  // 検索欄リセット
  const search = document.getElementById('p9ShareSearch');
  if (search) search.value = '';
  // 選択リセット
  document.querySelectorAll('.p9-share-row').forEach(r => r.classList.remove('selected'));
  const sendBtn = document.getElementById('p9ShareSendBtn');
  if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = true;
  // 全行表示
  document.querySelectorAll('.p9-share-row').forEach(r => r.style.display = '');
  document.getElementById('p9ShareOverlay').classList.add('open');
}
function p9ShareClose() {
  document.getElementById('p9ShareOverlay').classList.remove('open');
}
function p9ShareSelect(row) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.p9-share-row').forEach(r => r.classList.remove('selected'));
  row.classList.add('selected');
  const sendBtn = document.getElementById('p9ShareSendBtn');
  if (sendBtn) sendBtn.disabled = false;
}
function p9ShareFilter(val) {
  const kw = val.trim().toLowerCase();
  document.querySelectorAll('.p9-share-row').forEach(row => {
    const text = row.textContent.toLowerCase();
    row.style.display = (!kw || text.includes(kw)) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}
// p9ShareSend は VENDOR_TAB_JS に移動



// ── 見積編集フラグ ─────────────────────────
let p9EditMode = false;      // 編集モード中フラグ
let p9EditIndex = -1;        // 上書き対象のインデックス



// P4を「編集モード」に設定: 進む→P6直接・戻る→P6


// P5のOKボタンをP6直結 or 通常に切り替え
function p5SetEditOk(on) {
  const p5Ok = document.querySelector('#page5 .p5-ok');
  if (!p5Ok) return;
  if (on) {
    p5Ok.onclick = () => { p6BuildItems(); goPage(5, 6); };
  } else {
    p5Ok.onclick = () => { p6BuildItems(); goPage(5, 6); };
  }
}





// ── 見積共有後: 業者タブを追加 ──────────────
let p9VendorShared = null; // {company, estNo, data}

function p9ShareSend() {
  const selected = document.querySelector('.p9-share-row.selected');
  if (!selected) return;
  const company = selected.querySelector('.p9-share-company')?.textContent?.trim() || '';

  // 現在の見積データを記録
  const estNo    = document.getElementById('p9Breadcrumb')?.textContent?.trim() || '—';
  const name     = document.getElementById('p9Name')?.textContent?.trim() || '—';
  const koji     = document.getElementById('p9KojiName')?.textContent?.trim() || 'キッチン工事';
  const taxIn    = document.getElementById('p9TotalTaxIn')?.textContent?.trim() || '—';
  const taxEx    = document.getElementById('p9TotalTaxEx')?.textContent?.trim() || '—';

  p9VendorShared = { company, estNo, name, koji, taxIn, taxEx };

  // 業者タブを追加
  p9AddVendorTab(p9VendorShared);
  p9ShareClose();
}

function p9AddVendorTab(data) {
  const tabsContainer = document.getElementById('p9TabsContainer');
  if (!tabsContainer) return;

  // 既存タブから.activeを外す
  tabsContainer.querySelectorAll('.p9-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));

  // 業者タブがなければ追加
  let vendorTab = document.getElementById('p9VendorTab');
  if (!vendorTab) {
    vendorTab = document.createElement('button');
    vendorTab.className = 'p9-tab active';
    vendorTab.id = 'p9VendorTab';
    tabsContainer.appendChild(vendorTab);
  } else {
    vendorTab.classList.add('active');
  }
  vendorTab.textContent = data.estNo + '（業者用）';
  vendorTab.onclick = () => p9SwitchTab('vendor');

  // 元タブを非アクティブに
  const mainTab = document.getElementById('p9MainTab');
  if (mainTab) mainTab.onclick = () => p9SwitchTab('main');

  // 業者パネルにデータをセット
  p9FillVendorPanel(data);
  p9SwitchTab('vendor');
}

function p9SwitchTab(which) {
  const mainPanel   = document.getElementById('p9MainPanel');
  const vendorPanel = document.getElementById('p9VendorPanel');
  const mainTab     = document.getElementById('p9MainTab');
  const vendorTab   = document.getElementById('p9VendorTab');

  if (which === 'vendor') {
    if (mainPanel)   mainPanel.classList.add('hidden');
    if (vendorPanel) vendorPanel.classList.remove('hidden'), vendorPanel.classList.add('active');
    if (mainTab)     mainTab.classList.remove('active');
    if (vendorTab)   vendorTab.classList.add('active');
  } else {
    if (mainPanel)   mainPanel.classList.remove('hidden');
    if (vendorPanel) vendorPanel.classList.add('hidden'), vendorPanel.classList.remove('active');
    if (mainTab)     mainTab.classList.add('active');
    if (vendorTab)   vendorTab.classList.remove('active');
  }
}

function p9FillVendorPanel(data) {
  const set = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.textContent = val || '—'; };
  set('pv9Name',      data.name);
  set('pv9Koji',      data.koji);
  set('pv9EstNo',     data.estNo);
  set('pv9EstDate',   new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10));
  set('pv9TaxIn',     data.taxIn);
  set('pv9TaxEx',     data.taxEx);
  set('pv9CostEx',    data.taxEx);
  set('pv9CostIn',    data.taxIn);
  set('pv9RealCostEx', data.taxEx);
  set('pv9RealCostIn', data.taxIn);
}

</script>

<!-- ══ PAGE 5: 工事費・追加項目 ══ -->
<div class="page" id="page5">
<div class="p5-wrap">

  <!-- 背景: 前画面のP3ヘッダー風グレーバー -->
  <div class="p5-bg-header">
    <span class="p5-bg-header-title">キッチン工事</span>
  </div>

  <!-- モーダル -->
  <div class="p5-modal-overlay">
    <div class="p5-modal">
      <div class="p5-modal-title">工事費・追加項目</div>
      <div class="p5-modal-list">

      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-kitchen">
        <span class="p5-row-name">キッチン施工費</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box active" id="p5price-kitchen">¥ 200,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check on" id="p5check-kitchen" onclick="p5Toggle('kitchen')">✓</div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-gaihen">
        <span class="p5-row-name">外壁の開口工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-gaihen">¥ 44,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-gaihen" onclick="p5Toggle('gaihen')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-kenchiku">
        <span class="p5-row-name">建築壁の下地処理工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-kenchiku">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-kenchiku" onclick="p5Toggle('kenchiku')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-makita">
        <span class="p5-row-name">幕板取付壁下地処理</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-makita">¥ 44,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-makita" onclick="p5Toggle('makita')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-anker">
        <span class="p5-row-name">アンカー、吊ボルト工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-anker">¥ 22,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-anker" onclick="p5Toggle('anker')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-haiki">
        <span class="p5-row-name">排気ダクトの関連工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-haiki">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-haiki" onclick="p5Toggle('haiki')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-panel">
        <span class="p5-row-name">キッチンパネル下地処理工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-panel">¥ 44,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-panel" onclick="p5Toggle('panel')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-rangehood">
        <span class="p5-row-name">レンジフードの電気工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-rangehood">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-rangehood" onclick="p5Toggle('rangehood')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-ih_elec">
        <span class="p5-row-name">IH調理機器の電気工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-ih_elec">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-ih_elec" onclick="p5Toggle('ih_elec')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-tsuridana">
        <span class="p5-row-name">吊戸棚施工費</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-tsuridana">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-tsuridana" onclick="p5Toggle('tsuridana')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-wall">
        <span class="p5-row-name">ウォールユニット部分の電気工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-wall">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-wall" onclick="p5Toggle('wall')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-elev">
        <span class="p5-row-name">電動昇降ウォールユニットの電気工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-elev">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-elev" onclick="p5Toggle('elev')"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-row" id="p5row-dishwasher_elec">
        <span class="p5-row-name">食洗器用電源工事</span>
        <span class="p5-row-qty">1.0 式</span>
        <div class="p5-pm-wrap">
          <div class="p5-pm">—</div>
          <div class="p5-pm">+</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p5-price-box inactive" id="p5price-dishwasher_elec">¥ 33,000</div>
        <div class="p5-check off" id="p5check-dishwasher_elec" onclick="p5Toggle('dishwasher_elec')"></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="p5-modal-footer">
        <button class="p5-cancel" onclick="goPage(5,2)">キャンセル</button>
        <span class="p5-total-lbl">合計（税込）</span>
        <span class="p5-total-val" id="p5Total">¥ 242,000</span>
        <button class="p5-ok">OK</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- アプリフッター -->
  <div class="p5-footer">
    <button class="p5-back" onclick="goPage(5,2)">戻る</button>
    <div class="p5-footer-spacer"></div>
    <button class="p5-footer-btn" style="background:#7b1fa2;">リセット</button>
    <button class="p5-footer-btn" style="background:#d4a017;color:#555;">工事費・追加項目</button>
    <button class="p5-footer-btn" style="background:#43a047;">進む</button>
  </div>

</div>
</div>


<!-- ══ PAGE 6: 見積画面 ══ -->
<div class="page" id="page6">
<div class="p6-wrap">

  <!-- アプリヘッダー -->
  <div class="p6-appheader">
    <div class="p6-hdr-seg"><span style="font-size:26px">👤</span><span>担当者: テスト C...</span></div>
    <div class="p6-hdr-seg"><span style="font-size:26px">🏪</span><span style="padding-left:10px">本店</span></div>
    <div class="p6-hdr-center"><img class="p6-hdr-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="CAINZ"></div>
    <div class="p6-hdr-seg" style="border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding:0 20px;"><span style="font-size:26px">💼</span></div>
    <div class="p6-hdr-seg" style="flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:4px;min-width:120px;">
      <span style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);">工事名称</span>
    </div>
    <div class="p6-hdr-price"><span class="p6-hdr-plbl">税抜</span><span class="p6-hdr-pval" id="p6TaxEx">¥ 0</span></div>
    <div class="p6-hdr-price"><span class="p6-hdr-plbl">税込</span><span class="p6-hdr-pval" id="p6TaxIn">¥ 0</span></div>
  </div>

  <div class="p6-body">

    <!-- 左: 見積項目 -->
    <div class="p6-left">
      <div class="p6-section-header" style="justify-content:center;position:relative;">
        <span>見積項目</span>
        <button class="p6-edit-btn" style="position:absolute;right:14px;">編集</button>
      </div>

      <div class="p6-items-wrap" id="p6ItemsWrap">
        <!-- JS で動的生成 -->
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:200px;color:#aaa;font-size:16px;">
          <div style="font-size:60px;margin-bottom:10px;">📦</div>
          「選択中の商品はありません」
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="p6-summary-box">
        <div class="p6-summary-row"><span>合計(税抜):</span><span id="p6SumEx">¥ 0</span></div>
        <div class="p6-summary-row"><span>消費税:</span><span id="p6SumTax">¥ 0</span></div>
        <div class="p6-summary-row total"><span>合計(税込):</span><span id="p6SumIn">¥ 0</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="p6-confirm-row">
        <span>商品を確認しました</span>
        <div class="p6-confirm-check" id="p6ConfirmCheck" onclick="this.textContent=this.textContent?'':'✓'"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="p6-sign-row">
        <div class="p6-sign-box">
          <div class="p6-sign-title">お客様署名</div>
          <div class="p6-sign-add">✏ 追加</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p6-sign-box">
          <div class="p6-sign-title">特記事項</div>
          <textarea id="p6Tokki" placeholder="特記事項を入力してください"
            style="flex:1;border:none;outline:none;resize:none;font-family:inherit;font-size:14px;color:#333;padding:6px 4px;background:transparent;width:100%;"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 右: 情報パネル -->
    <div class="p6-right">

      <!-- お客様情報 -->
      <div class="p6-panel">
        <div class="p6-panel-title">
          <button class="p6-panel-edit">編集</button>
          <span>お客様情報</span>
          <button class="p6-panel-memo">メモ</button>
        </div>
        <div class="p6-panel-body">
          名前:<br>電話番号:<br>Eメール:
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 住宅情報 -->
      <div class="p6-panel">
        <div class="p6-panel-title"><span style="opacity:0;font-size:11px">x</span><span>住宅情報</span><span style="opacity:0;font-size:11px">x</span></div>
        <div class="p6-panel-body">
          住所: <span class="p6-field-required">（必須）</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 予約カレンダー -->
      <div class="p6-panel">
        <div class="p6-panel-title"><span style="opacity:0;font-size:11px">x</span><span>予約カレンダー</span><span style="opacity:0;font-size:11px">x</span></div>
        <div class="p6-panel-body" style="line-height:1.9;font-size:13px;">
          契約日:<br>着工日:<br>完工日:<br>引渡日:<br>契約金:<br>着工金:<br>完工金:
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 見積概要 -->
      <div class="p6-panel">
        <div class="p6-panel-title"><span style="opacity:0;font-size:11px">x</span><span>見積概要</span><span style="opacity:0;font-size:11px">x</span></div>
        <div class="p6-panel-body">
          <div class="p6-estimate-row"><span>合計（税込）</span><span id="p6EstTotal">¥ 0</span></div>
          <div class="p6-discount-input">
            <button class="p6-discount-btn">x</button>
            <div class="p6-discount-cell">00</div>
            <div class="p6-discount-cell">000</div>
            <div class="p6-discount-cell">0000</div>
          </div>
          <div class="p6-estimate-row"><span>追加割引:</span><span>¥ 0</span></div>
          <div class="p6-estimate-row total"><span>合計（税込）:</span><span id="p6EstFinal">¥ 0</span></div>
          <div class="p6-agree-row">合計金額に同意する <div class="p6-agree-check"></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="p6-action-btns">
          <button class="p6-act-btn orange">⊕ 割引/追加項目</button>
          <button class="p6-act-btn gray">👥 承認</button>
        </div>
        <div class="p6-action-btns" style="padding-top:0">
          <button class="p6-act-btn blue">💾 見積</button>
          <button class="p6-act-btn green">✅ 受注</button>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ナビバー -->
  <div class="p6-navbar">
    <div class="p6-nav"><span class="p6-nav-ico">🏠</span><span class="p6-nav-lbl">ホームページ</span></div>
    <div class="p6-nav"><span class="p6-nav-ico">📅</span><span class="p6-nav-lbl">カレンダー</span></div>
    <div class="p6-nav active"><span class="p6-nav-ico">🛒</span><span class="p6-nav-lbl">カート</span><div class="p6-nav-bar"></div></div>
    <div class="p6-nav"><span class="p6-nav-ico">♦</span><span class="p6-nav-lbl">クリア</span></div>
    <div class="p6-nav"><span class="p6-nav-ico">⚙️</span><span class="p6-nav-lbl">設定</span></div>
    <div class="p6-nav"><span class="p6-nav-ico">👤</span><span class="p6-nav-lbl">顧客情報</span></div>
  </div>

</div>
</div>


<!-- ══ PAGE 7: 顧客登録画面 ══ -->
<div class="page" id="page7">
<div class="p7-wrap">

  <!-- アプリヘッダー -->
  <div class="p7-appheader">
    <div class="p7-hdr-seg"><span style="font-size:26px">👤</span><span>担当者: テスト C...</span></div>
    <div class="p7-hdr-seg"><span style="font-size:26px">🏪</span><span style="padding-left:10px">本店</span></div>
    <div class="p7-hdr-center"><img class="p7-hdr-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="CAINZ"></div>
    <div class="p7-hdr-seg" style="border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding:0 20px;"><span style="font-size:26px">💼</span></div>
    <div class="p7-hdr-seg" style="flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:4px;min-width:120px;">
      <span style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);">工事名称</span>
    </div>
    <div class="p7-hdr-price"><span class="p7-hdr-plbl">税抜</span><span class="p7-hdr-pval">¥ 0</span></div>
    <div class="p7-hdr-price"><span class="p7-hdr-plbl">税込</span><span class="p7-hdr-pval">¥ 0</span></div>
  </div>

  <div class="p7-body">

    <!-- 上段フォーム（写真＋基本情報） -->
    <div style="background:white;border:1.5px solid #1a3a6e;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;padding:14px 20px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:180px 1fr 1fr;gap:10px 24px;align-items:start;">

      <!-- 写真 -->
      <div style="grid-row:1/7;display:flex;">
        <div class="p7-photo-box">
          <span class="p7-photo-icon">🖼</span>
          <div class="p7-photo-add">＋</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 左中カラム -->
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">種別:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">姓：漢字:<span class="p7-required-mark">*</span></span>
          <div style="flex:1;">
            <input class="p7-field-input required" id="p7LastName" type="text" placeholder="" style="width:100%">
            <div class="p7-error-msg" id="p7LastNameErr">姓（漢字）は必須項目です</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">名：漢字:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">姓：カナ:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">名：カナ:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 右カラム -->
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">引渡日:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
          <span class="p7-cal-icon">📅</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">分譲地・マンション名 漢字:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">分譲地・マンション名 カナ:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">号地:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label">担当者氏名:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 下段フォーム -->
    <div style="background:white;border:1.5px solid #1a3a6e;border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 4px 4px;padding:10px 20px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 30px;">

      <!-- 左カラム -->
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;">
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">郵便番号:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">住所漢字:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">電話番号 1:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="tel" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">電話番号 2:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="tel" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">ファックス番号:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="tel" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">メールアドレス:</span>
          <span style="font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;">📷</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="email" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">予算:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">メモ:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="修正したいメモを選択してください">
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- 右カラム -->
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;padding-left:24px;">
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">引渡日:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
          <span class="p7-cal-icon">📅</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">日本戸建管理:</span>
          <div class="p7-toggle-wrap">
            <button class="p7-toggle-btn inactive" onclick="p7Toggle(this)">会員</button>
            <button class="p7-toggle-btn active" onclick="p7Toggle(this)">非会員</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">入会日:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
          <span class="p7-cal-icon">📅</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">居住年数:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">築年数:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">反響月日:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">反響媒体:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
        <div class="p7-field-row">
          <span class="p7-field-label" style="min-width:130px">時期:</span>
          <input class="p7-field-input" type="text" placeholder="">
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- フッター -->
  <div class="p7-footer">
    <button class="p7-back-btn" onclick="goPage(7,6)">
      <span style="font-size:20px;">‹</span> 戻る
    </button>
    <button class="p7-create-btn" onclick="p7Submit()">
      <span style="font-size:18px;">🔬</span> 作成
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
</div>


<!-- ══ 見積アクションモーダル ══ -->
<div class="mitsumori-modal-overlay" id="mitsumoriModal">
  <div class="mitsumori-modal">
    <button class="mitsumori-btn select" onclick="closeMitsumoriModal()">選択</button>
    <button class="mitsumori-btn print" onclick="mitsumoriPrint()">
      <span class="mitsumori-btn-icon">🖨</span> 印刷
    </button>
    <button class="mitsumori-btn email" onclick="mitsumoriEmail()">
      <span class="mitsumori-btn-icon">✉</span> Eメール
    </button>
    <button class="mitsumori-btn done" onclick="mitsumoriDone()">
      <span class="mitsumori-btn-icon">✅</span> 完了
    </button>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══ PAGE 8: 見積履歴 ══ -->
<div class="page" id="page8">
<div class="p8-wrap">
<div class="p8-layout">

  <!-- サイドバー -->
  <div class="p8-sidebar">
    <div class="p8-sidebar-logo">
      <span>📋</span>即決革命
    </div>
    <div class="p8-sidebar-item">
      <span class="p8-sidebar-icon">⬇</span>アプリDL
    </div>
    <div class="p8-sidebar-item">
      <span class="p8-sidebar-icon">✔</span>受注履歴
    </div>
    <div class="p8-sidebar-item active">
      <span class="p8-sidebar-icon">📄</span>見積履歴
    </div>
    <div class="p8-sidebar-item">
      <span class="p8-sidebar-icon">＋</span>受注
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- メインコンテンツ -->
  <div class="p8-main">

    <!-- トップバー -->
    <div class="p8-topbar">
      <button class="p8-lang-btn">日本語 ▼</button>
      <div class="p8-topbar-spacer"></div>
      <button class="p8-company-btn">👥 株式会社 Cainz</button>
      <div class="p8-user-btn">👤 cainztest ▼</div>
    </div>

    <div class="p8-content">

      <!-- ヒーローバナー -->
      <div class="p8-hero">
        <div class="p8-hero-bg"></div>
        <span class="p8-hero-title">見積履歴</span>
      </div>

      <!-- サマリーカード -->
      <div class="p8-summary-row">
        <div class="p8-summary-card">
          <div class="p8-summary-label">見積件数合計</div>
          <div class="p8-summary-value" id="p8Count">1</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p8-summary-card">
          <div class="p8-summary-label">注文金額合計(税込)</div>
          <div class="p8-summary-value" id="p8TotalAmount">¥ 0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p8-summary-card">
          <div class="p8-summary-label">工事原価合計(税込)</div>
          <div class="p8-summary-value" id="p8CostAmount">¥ 0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p8-summary-card">
          <div class="p8-summary-label">粗利益合計(税込)</div>
          <div class="p8-summary-value">¥ 0</div>
        </div>
        <div class="p8-summary-card">
          <div class="p8-summary-label">利益率合計(税込)</div>
          <div class="p8-summary-value">0.00%</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- テーブル -->
      <div class="p8-table-wrap">
        <div class="p8-table-controls">
          <select class="p8-count-select"><option>20</option><option>50</option><option>100</option></select>
          <span style="font-size:13px;color:#555">表示件数</span>
          <div class="p8-table-spacer"></div>
          <button class="p8-print-btn">🖨 印刷</button>
          <button class="p8-filter-btn">▼ 絞込み検索</button>
        </div>

        <table class="p8-table">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>ランク</th>
              <th>担当者</th>
              <th>見積No</th>
              <th>顧客名</th>
              <th>工事名</th>
              <th>見積提出日</th>
              <th>注文金額<br>(税込)</th>
              <th>原価<br>(税込)</th>
              <th>粗利益<br>(税込)</th>
              <th>利益率<br>(税込)</th>
              <th>住所</th>
              <th>種別</th>
              <th>分譲地名</th>
              <th>号地</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="p8TableBody">
            <!-- JS で動的生成 -->
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>


<!-- ══ PAGE 9: 見積詳細 ══ -->
<div class="page" id="page9">
<div class="p9-wrap">
<div class="p9-layout">
  <div class="p9-sidebar">
    <div class="p9-sidebar-logo"><span>📋</span>即決革命</div>
    <div class="p9-sidebar-item"><span>⬇</span>アプリDL</div>
    <div class="p9-sidebar-item"><span>✔</span>受注履歴</div>
    <div class="p9-sidebar-item active"><span>📄</span>見積履歴</div>
    <div class="p9-sidebar-item"><span>＋</span>受注</div>
  </div>
  <div class="p9-main">
    <div class="p9-topbar">
      <button class="p9-lang-btn">日本語 ▼</button>
      <div class="p9-topbar-spacer"></div>
      <button class="p9-company-btn">👥 株式会社 Cainz</button>
      <div class="p9-user-btn">👤 cainztest ▼</div>
    </div>
    <div class="p9-content">

      <!-- タブ＋ボタン行 -->
      <div class="p9-tabs-wrap">
        <div class="p9-tabs" id="p9TabsContainer">
          <button class="p9-tab active" id="p9MainTab" onclick="p9SwitchTab('main')">0101T001</button>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;">
          <button class="p9-share-btn" onclick="p9EditEstimate()" style="background:#1a3a6e;color:white;border-color:#1a3a6e;">✏ 見積編集</button>
          <button class="p9-share-btn" onclick="p9ShareOpen()">見積共有</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- メインパネル -->
      <div id="p9MainPanel" class="p9-main-panel">
        <!-- ══ 顧客情報セクション ══ -->
      <div class="p9-section">
        <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('custSection','custArrow')">
          <span class="p9-section-title">顧客情報</span>
          <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="custArrow">∨</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-section-body" id="custSection">
          <div class="p9-info-grid">
            <!-- 左列 -->
            <div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">氏名</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value" id="p9Name">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">現場住所</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value" id="p9Address">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">電子契約日</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">見積No.</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value" id="p9EstNo">0101T001</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item">
                <div class="p9-info-label">担当</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">テスト Cainz</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <!-- 中列 -->
            <div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">工事名</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value" id="p9KojiName">キッチン工事</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">分譲地名</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">差替契約日</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">見積日</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value" id="p9EstDate">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item">
                <div class="p9-info-label">ランク</div>
                <select class="p9-rank-select">
                  <option>見積提出済</option>
                  <option>受注</option>
                  <option>失注</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
            <!-- 右列 -->
            <div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">種別</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">号地</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">契約日</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
                <div class="p9-info-label">ステータス</div>
                <div class="p9-info-value">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="p9-info-item">
                <div class="p9-info-label">承諾</div>
                <div><span class="p9-badge">未</span></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ══ 見積・受注情報セクション ══ -->
      <div class="p9-section">
        <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('estSection','estArrow')">
          <span class="p9-section-title">見積・受注情報</span>
          <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="estArrow">∨</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-section-body" id="estSection">

          <!-- 見積金額合計 -->
          <div class="p9-estimate-table-wrap">
            <div class="p9-est-title">見積金額合計</div>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;font-size:13px;">
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;">
                <span style="color:#888">税込</span>
                <span style="margin-left:20px;font-weight:700;" id="p9TotalTaxIn">—</span>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;border-left:1px solid #ddd;">
                <span style="color:#888">税抜</span>
                <span style="margin-left:20px;font-weight:700;" id="p9TotalTaxEx">—</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <!-- 詳細グリッド -->
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0;margin-top:8px;font-size:13px;">
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;">
                <div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">予定原価合計</div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> <span id="p9CostEx">—</span></div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> <span id="p9CostIn">—</span></div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;">
                <div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">予定粗利合計</div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> 0 円</div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> 0 円</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;">
                <div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">予定利益率</div>
                <div>0.00%</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-top:1px solid #ddd;">
                <div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">実行原価合計</div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> <span id="p9RealCostEx">—</span></div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> <span id="p9RealCostIn">—</span></div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;border-top:1px solid #ddd;">
                <div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">実行粗利合計</div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> 0 円</div>
                <div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> 0 円</div>
              </div>
              <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;border-top:1px solid #ddd;">
                <div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">実行利益率</div>
                <div>0.00%</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- 工事詳細 -->
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 40px;font-size:13px;">
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">工事名</span><span class="p9-detail-value" id="p9KojiName2">—</span></div>
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">完工予定日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">見積No.</span><span class="p9-detail-value" id="p9EstNo2">—</span></div>
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">完工日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">着工予定日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">支払完了日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">着工日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
            <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">特記事項</span><span class="p9-detail-value" id="p9Remarks">—</span></div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>


      <!-- ══ エクスポートセクション ══ -->
      <div class="p9-section">
        <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('exportSection','exportArrow')">
          <span class="p9-section-title">エクスポート</span>
          <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="exportArrow">∨</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-section-body" id="exportSection">
          <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <button class="p9-export-btn">
              <span class="p9-export-icon">📄</span> 見積書
            </button>
            <button class="p9-export-btn">
              <span class="p9-export-icon">📊</span> エクセル出力
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ══ 電子取引履歴セクション ══ -->
      <div class="p9-section">
        <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('densiSection','densiArrow')">
          <span class="p9-section-title">電子取引履歴</span>
          <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="densiArrow">∨</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-section-body" id="densiSection">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-bottom:10px;">
            <button class="p9-export-btn" style="background:#3f51b5;" >
              <span class="p9-export-icon">📊</span> 帳票出力履歴
            </button>
          </div>
          <table class="p9-densi-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>日付/時刻</th><th>ユーザー名</th><th>姓</th><th>名</th>
                <th>書類名</th><th>見積No</th><th>顧客/業者 メールアドレス</th><th>備考</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="p9DensiBody"></tbody>
          </table>
      </div>
      </div>

      </div><!-- /p9MainPanel -->

      <!-- ══ 業者用見積パネル ══ -->
      <div id="p9VendorPanel" class="p9-vendor-panel">
        <div class="p9-section">
          <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('pvCustSection','pvCustArrow')">
            <span class="p9-section-title">顧客情報</span>
            <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="pvCustArrow">∨</span>
          </div>
          <div class="p9-section-body" id="pvCustSection">
            <div class="p9-info-grid">
              <div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">氏名</div><div class="p9-info-value" id="pv9Name">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">現場住所</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">電子契約日</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">見積No.</div><div class="p9-info-value" id="pv9EstNo">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item"><div class="p9-info-label">担当</div><div class="p9-info-value">テスト Cainz</div></div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">工事名</div><div class="p9-info-value" id="pv9Koji">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">分譲地名</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">差替契約日</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">見積日</div><div class="p9-info-value" id="pv9EstDate">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item">
                  <div class="p9-info-label">ランク</div>
                  <select class="p9-rank-select"><option>見積提出済</option><option>受注</option><option>失注</option></select>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
