                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">種別</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">号地</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">契約日</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item" style="margin-bottom:18px"><div class="p9-info-label">ステータス</div><div class="p9-info-value">—</div></div>
                <div class="p9-info-item"><div class="p9-info-label">承諾</div><div><span class="p9-badge">未</span></div></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-section">
          <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('pvEstSection','pvEstArrow')">
            <span class="p9-section-title">見積・受注情報</span>
            <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="pvEstArrow">∨</span>
          </div>
          <div class="p9-section-body" id="pvEstSection">
            <div class="p9-estimate-table-wrap">
              <div class="p9-est-title">見積金額合計</div>
              <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;font-size:13px;">
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;"><span style="color:#888">税込</span><span style="margin-left:20px;font-weight:700;" id="pv9TaxIn">—</span></div>
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;border-left:1px solid #ddd;"><span style="color:#888">税抜</span><span style="margin-left:20px;font-weight:700;" id="pv9TaxEx">—</span></div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0;margin-top:8px;font-size:13px;">
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">予定原価合計</div><div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> <span id="pv9CostEx">—</span></div><div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> <span id="pv9CostIn">—</span></div></div>
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">予定粗利合計</div><div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> 0 円</div><div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> 0 円</div></div>
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">予定利益率</div><div>0.00%</div></div>
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-top:1px solid #ddd;"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">実行原価合計</div><div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> <span id="pv9RealCostEx">—</span></div><div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> <span id="pv9RealCostIn">—</span></div></div>
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;border-top:1px solid #ddd;"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">実行粗利合計</div><div><span style="color:#888">税抜</span> 0 円</div><div><span style="color:#888">税込</span> 0 円</div></div>
                <div style="padding:6px 16px;border-left:1px solid #ddd;border-top:1px solid #ddd;"><div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px">実行利益率</div><div>0.00%</div></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 40px;font-size:13px;margin-top:14px;">
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">工事名</span><span class="p9-detail-value" id="pv9KojiName2">—</span></div>
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">完工予定日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">見積No.</span><span class="p9-detail-value" id="pv9EstNo2">—</span></div>
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">完工日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">着工予定日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">支払完了日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">着工日</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
              <div class="p9-detail-row"><span class="p9-detail-label">特記事項</span><span class="p9-detail-value">—</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

        <!-- ══ 業者用 エクスポートセクション ══ -->
        <div class="p9-section">
          <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('pvExportSection','pvExportArrow')">
            <span class="p9-section-title">エクスポート</span>
            <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="pvExportArrow">∨</span>
          </div>
          <div class="p9-section-body" id="pvExportSection">
            <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <button class="p9-export-btn">
                <span class="p9-export-icon">📄</span> 見積書
              </button>
              <button class="p9-export-btn">
                <span class="p9-export-icon">📊</span> エクセル出力
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ══ 業者用 電子取引履歴セクション ══ -->
        <div class="p9-section">
          <div class="p9-section-header" onclick="p9Toggle('pvDensiSection','pvDensiArrow')">
            <span class="p9-section-title">電子取引履歴</span>
            <span class="p9-section-arrow" id="pvDensiArrow">∨</span>
          </div>
          <div class="p9-section-body" id="pvDensiSection">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-bottom:10px;">
              <button class="p9-export-btn" style="background:#3f51b5;">
                <span class="p9-export-icon">📊</span> 帳票出力履歴
              </button>
            </div>
            <table class="p9-densi-table">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>日付/時刻</th><th>ユーザー名</th><th>姓</th><th>名</th>
                  <th>書類名</th><th>見積No</th><th>顧客/業者 メールアドレス</th><th>備考</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="pvDensiBody"></tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>



    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══ 見積共有モーダル ══ -->
<div class="p9-share-overlay" id="p9ShareOverlay">
  <div class="p9-share-modal">
    <div class="p9-share-modal-title">業者一覧</div>
    <div class="p9-share-search-wrap">
      <input class="p9-share-search" id="p9ShareSearch" type="text" placeholder=""
             oninput="p9ShareFilter(this.value)">
      <div class="p9-share-search-icon">🔍</div>
    </div>
    <div class="p9-share-list" id="p9ShareList">
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">即決木材(株)</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person">加藤　太郎</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">(株)加藤環境</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">即決電気(株)</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">吉村設備</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">田中興業</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">佐藤組工業</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">(株)ETOH</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">木村電機</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">有馬左官</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="p9-share-row" onclick="p9ShareSelect(this)">
          <span class="p9-share-company">田村木材工業</span>
          <span class="p9-share-person"></span>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="p9-share-footer">
      <button class="p9-share-cancel" onclick="p9ShareClose()">キャンセル</button>
      <button class="p9-share-send" id="p9ShareSendBtn" disabled onclick="p9ShareSend()">共有</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<script>
// ── P4セクション定義（カテゴリkey → 表示名）
const P4_SECTION_LABELS = {
  plan:       'プラン',
  height:     'カウンター高さ',
  sink:       'シンク位置',
  color:      '扉カラー',
  counter:    'カウンター素材',
  stove:      'コンロ',
  faucet:     '水栓',
  hood:       'レンジフード',
  storage:    '吊り戸棚・収納',
  dishwasher: '食器洗い乾燥機',
};

// 編集モードフラグ（グローバル）
// p9EditMode, p9EditIndex, p7Registered, p9VendorShared は別箇所で宣言済み

// ── p6BuildItems: P4選択状態からP6明細を構築 ──
function p6BuildItems() {
  const wrap = document.getElementById('p6ItemsWrap');
  if (!wrap) return;

  const BASE_PRICE = 980000;
  const allItems = [];
  allItems.push({ name: 'LIXILシステムキッチン 本体', qty: '1.00 式', price: BASE_PRICE });

  for (const [key, label] of Object.entries(P4_SECTION_LABELS)) {
    const summaryEl = document.getElementById('summary-' + key);
    const summaryText = summaryEl ? summaryEl.textContent.trim() : '';
    if (!summaryText) continue;
    const diff = (typeof prices !== 'undefined' && prices[key]) ? prices[key] : 0;
    allItems.push({ name: label + '：' + summaryText, qty: '1.00 式', price: diff });
  }

  const p5Names = {
    kitchen:'キッチン施工費', gaihen:'外壁の開口工事',
    kenchiku:'建築壁の下地処理工事', makita:'幕板取付壁下地処理',
    anker:'アンカー、吊ボルト工事', haiki:'排気ダクトの関連工事',
    panel:'キッチンパネル下地処理工事', rangehood:'レンジフードの電気工事',
    ih_elec:'IH調理機器の電気工事', tsuridana:'吊戸棚施工費',
    wall:'ウォールユニット部分の電気工事', elev:'電動昇降ウォールユニットの電気工事',
    dishwasher_elec:'食洗器用電源工事',
  };
  for (const [key, name] of Object.entries(p5Names)) {
    if (typeof p5Checked !== 'undefined' && p5Checked[key]) {
      allItems.push({ name: '【工事費】' + name, qty: '1.00 式', price: P5_PRICES[key] || 0 });
    }
  }

  // 戻るボタンは p6UpdateBackBtn() で設定するのでここでは onclick なし
  let html = `<div class="p6-category-header" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;">
    <button id="p6BackBtn" style="position:absolute;left:12px;background:#888;color:white;border:none;border-radius:4px;height:30px;padding:0 14px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;">戻る</button>
    <span>キッチン</span>
  </div>`;

  let grandTotal = 0;
  allItems.forEach(it => {
    grandTotal += it.price;
    const priceStr = it.price === 0 ? '¥ 0'
      : it.price > 0 ? '¥ ' + it.price.toLocaleString('ja-JP')
      : '－¥ ' + Math.abs(it.price).toLocaleString('ja-JP');
    const priceColor = it.price < 0 ? 'color:#1565c0' : '';
    html += `<div class="p6-item-row">
      <span class="p6-item-name">${it.name}</span>
      <span class="p6-item-qty">${it.qty}</span>
      <span class="p6-item-price" style="${priceColor}">${priceStr}</span>
    </div>`;
  });
  html += `<div class="p6-total-row">
    <span class="p6-total-label">TOTAL</span>
    <span class="p6-total-count">${allItems.length}</span>
    <span class="p6-total-amount">¥ ${grandTotal.toLocaleString('ja-JP')}</span>
  </div>`;

  wrap.innerHTML = html;

  const tax   = Math.floor(grandTotal * 0.1);
  const total = grandTotal + tax;
  const fmt   = n => '¥ ' + n.toLocaleString('ja-JP');
  document.getElementById('p6SumEx').textContent    = fmt(grandTotal);
  document.getElementById('p6SumTax').textContent   = fmt(tax);
  document.getElementById('p6SumIn').textContent    = fmt(total);
  document.getElementById('p6EstTotal').textContent = fmt(total);
  document.getElementById('p6EstFinal').textContent = fmt(total);
  document.getElementById('p6TaxEx').textContent    = '¥ ' + grandTotal.toLocaleString('ja-JP');
  document.getElementById('p6TaxIn').textContent    = '¥ ' + total.toLocaleString('ja-JP');

  // 戻るボタンのonclickを設定
  p6UpdateBackBtn();
}

// P6の「戻る」ボタンのonclickを現在モードに応じて設定
function p6UpdateBackBtn() {
  const btn = document.getElementById('p6BackBtn');
  if (!btn) return;
  if (p9EditMode) {
    // 編集モード: P4に戻り、P4の進む→P6に変更
    btn.onclick = () => {
      goPage(6, 2);
      p4SetEditMode(true);
    };
  } else {
    // 通常モード: P4に戻る（P5→P6が通常フロー）
    btn.onclick = () => goPage(6, 2);
  }
}

// P4のボタンを編集モード / 通常モードに切り替え
function p4SetEditMode(on) {
  const backBtn    = document.getElementById('p4BackBtn');
  const confirmBtn = document.querySelector('#page2 .p4-confirm');
  if (on) {
    // P4戻る → P6（明細を再構築して戻る）
    if (backBtn) backBtn.onclick = () => {
      goPage(2, 6);
      p6BuildItems();
    };
    // P4進む → P5経由でP6（P5で工事費再確認）
    if (confirmBtn) confirmBtn.onclick = () => {
      p5SyncFromP4();
      goPage(2, 5);
      // P5のOKをP6直結に
      setTimeout(() => {
        const p5Ok = document.querySelector('#page5 .p5-ok');
        if (p5Ok) p5Ok.onclick = () => { p6BuildItems(); goPage(5, 6); };
      }, 0);
    };
  } else {
    // 通常に戻す
    if (backBtn)    backBtn.onclick = () => goPage(2, 1);
    if (confirmBtn) confirmBtn.onclick = () => { p5SyncFromP4(); goPage(2, 5); };
    // P5のOKも通常に戻す
    const p5Ok = document.querySelector('#page5 .p5-ok');
    if (p5Ok) p5Ok.onclick = () => { p6BuildItems(); goPage(5, 6); };
  }
}

// P9「見積編集」エントリーポイント
function p9EditEstimate() {
  const vendorTab = document.getElementById('p9VendorTab');
  const isVendorActive = vendorTab && vendorTab.classList.contains('active');

  if (isVendorActive) {
    p9EditMode  = true;
    p9EditIndex = -2;
  } else {
    const mainTab = document.getElementById('p9MainTab');
    const estNo   = mainTab ? mainTab.textContent.trim() : '';
    p9EditIndex = p8Estimates.findIndex((e, i) => {
      const no = '0101T' + String(p8Estimates.length - i).padStart(3, '0');
      return no === estNo;
    });
    p9EditMode = true;
  }

  // P6へ遷移 → 明細を最新化 → 編集モード設定
  goPage(9, 6);
  p6BuildItems();    // 明細を描画（戻るボタンもここで設定される）
  p4SetEditMode(true); // P4ボタンを編集モードに

  // 「見積」→「上書き保存」に変更
  const mitsumoriBtn = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-act-btn.blue');
  if (mitsumoriBtn) {
    mitsumoriBtn.textContent = '💾 上書き保存';
    mitsumoriBtn.onclick = () => p6OverwriteSave();
  }
}

// 上書き保存
function p6OverwriteSave() {
  // 最新明細を確実に反映
  p6BuildItems();

  const totalEl  = document.getElementById('p6SumIn');
  const totalStr = totalEl ? totalEl.textContent.replace(/[¥,\s]/g, '') : '0';
  const total    = parseInt(totalStr, 10) || 0;
  const taxEx    = Math.round(total / 1.1);
  const fmt      = n => n.toLocaleString('ja-JP') + ' 円';

  const custPanel = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-panel-body');
  let customerName = '—';
  if (custPanel) {
    const match = custPanel.innerHTML.match(/名前:\s*([^<]+)/);
    if (match) customerName = match[1].trim();
  }

  const setEl = (id, val) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = val; };

  if (p9EditIndex === -2) {
    // ── 業者用のみ更新 ──
    if (p9VendorShared) {
      p9VendorShared.totalTaxIn = total;
      p9VendorShared.name       = customerName;
      p9VendorShared.taxIn      = fmt(total);
      p9VendorShared.taxEx      = fmt(taxEx);
    }
    setEl('pv9Name',        customerName);
    setEl('pv9TaxIn',       fmt(total));
    setEl('pv9TaxEx',       fmt(taxEx));
    setEl('pv9CostEx',      fmt(taxEx));
    setEl('pv9CostIn',      fmt(total));
    setEl('pv9RealCostEx',  fmt(taxEx));
    setEl('pv9RealCostIn',  fmt(total));
    setEl('pv9EstDate',     new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10));
  ['pvCustSection','pvEstSection'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.add('open');
  });
  ['pvCustArrow','pvEstArrow'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.add('open');
  });

    // 後処理
    p9EditMode = false; p9EditIndex = -1;
    p4SetEditMode(false);
    const btn = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-act-btn.blue');
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = '💾 見積'; btn.onclick = () => p7Registered ? openMitsumoriModal() : goPage(6, 7); }
    goPage(6, 9);
    setTimeout(() => p9SwitchTab('vendor'), 50);

  } else {
    // ── 自社用のみ更新 ──
    const updated = { customerName, kojiName: 'キッチン工事', totalTaxIn: total, address: '' };
    if (p9EditIndex >= 0 && p9EditIndex < p8Estimates.length) {
      p8Estimates[p9EditIndex] = updated;
    } else {
      p8Estimates.unshift(updated);
    }
    p8RefreshTable();
    setEl('p9Name',       customerName);
    setEl('p9TotalTaxIn', fmt(total));
    setEl('p9TotalTaxEx', fmt(taxEx));
    setEl('p9CostEx',     fmt(taxEx));
    setEl('p9CostIn',     fmt(total));
    setEl('p9RealCostEx', fmt(taxEx));
    setEl('p9RealCostIn', fmt(total));

    // 後処理
    p9EditMode = false; p9EditIndex = -1;
    p4SetEditMode(false);
    const btn = document.querySelector('#page6 .p6-act-btn.blue');
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = '💾 見積'; btn.onclick = () => p7Registered ? openMitsumoriModal() : goPage(6, 7); }
    goPage(6, 9);
    setTimeout(() => p9SwitchTab('main'), 50);
  }
}


</script>
</body>
</html>
